opinion.h4: TEITELBAUM v. CALIFORNIA. APPEAL FROM THE DISTRICT COURT OF APPEAL OF CALIFORNIA, SECOND APPELLATE DISTRICT. No. 678. Decided March 30, 1959.
opinion.p: Stanley Mosk, Attorney General of California, William E. James, Assistant Attorney General, and Herschel T. Elkins, Deputy Attorney General, for appellee.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for certiorari, certiorari is denied.
359 U.S. 206 TURNER ET AL. v. KANSAS. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF KANSAS. No. 688. Decided March 30, 1959.
Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
The appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
